description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with a complex, multi-sectioned hip roof covered in dark gray tiles. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored stone or brick, giving it a solid and upscale appearance. The front facade includes two prominent rounded turrets flanking the main entrance, which is accentuated by a covered porch and decorative columns. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, with some sections featuring bay windows and others with standard rectangular panes. The property is set on a landscaped lot with a wide driveway leading to a multi-car garage, and there are flower beds and green lawns surrounding the building. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on horizontal lines and a low, expansive profile.
description: A large, single-story stone house with a complex hip roof, rounded turrets, and a landscaped yard with a wide driveway and garage. The design combines traditional and modern elements with asymmetrical windows and decorative entry features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance flanked by two rounded turrets, a covered porch, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, horizontal expanse of the house, multiple windows, and the stone perimeter wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view displaying the wide driveway, garage doors, and landscaped lawn with flower beds along the facade.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, driveway, and a side entrance, as well as the connection between different roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, flanked by rounded turrets, and a wide set of steps leading to a decorative front door.
